mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_qna_post ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT * FROM tb_qna_post WHERE title LIKE '%' + #{title} + '%' ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_qna_post WHERE title LIKE '%' + #{title} + '%'
SELECT * FROM tb_qna_post WHERE category = #{category} ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_qna_post WHERE category = #{category}
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_qna_post SET views = views + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_qna_post (title, content, category, author_name, author_dept, author_email, views, is_answered, is_public, created_at, modified_at) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, #{category}, #{authorName}, #{authorDept}, #{authorEmail}, 0, 0, #{isPublic,jdbcType=BIT}, GETDATE(), GETDATE())
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_qna_post SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, category = #{category}, is_public = #{isPublic,jdbcType=BIT}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE tb_qna_post SET answer = #{answer}, answer_author_name = #{answerAuthorName}, answer_author_dept = #{answerAuthorDept}, answer_date = GETDATE(), is_answered = 1, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
